//: The four attributes. Skills (skills.json) each cite one of these as their governing attribute; combat-tuning.json maps them to derived stats.

attributes.name: Brawn
attributes.desc: Muscle, lungs, and the will to keep standing. Drives heavy weapons, feats of force, and how much punishment you can take.

attributes.name: Finesse
attributes.desc: Quick hands and quicker feet. Drives speed in combat, lockwork, light steps, and acting before anyone notices.

attributes.name: Intellect
attributes.desc: Memory, study, and pattern-sight. Drives lore, mechanisms, wind-craft, and how much focus you can hold for abilities.

attributes.name: Presence
attributes.desc: The weight of your voice in a world losing its sound. Drives persuasion, reading people, and resonant arts.
